# clang trunk: assertion "Invalid scalar expression to emit" in EmitScalarExpr during codegen of __builtin_preserve_access_index on printf-style string literal

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173911
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clang:codegen, crash, generated by fuzzer

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: 

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

## Console
```console
clang: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/CodeGen/CGExprScalar.cpp:5986: llvm::Value* clang::CodeGen::CodeGenFunction::EmitScalarExpr(const clang::Expr*, bool): Assertion `E && hasScalarEvaluationKind(E->getType()) && "Invalid scalar expression to emit"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```

## Code
```c
struct weird {
  struct {
    int b;
  };
  char x;
  union {
    int a;
    int c;
  };
};
int test(struct weird *arg) {
  int *x = __builtin_preserve_access_index(
      "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx%"
      "dxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx");
  int *y = __builtin_preserve_access_index(&arg->c);
  return *x + *y;
}
```


## Code
```c
struct weird {
  struct {
    int b;
  };
  char x;
  union {
    int a;
    int c;
  };
};
int test(struct weird *arg) {
  int *x = __builtin_preserve_access_index(
      "xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx%"
      "dxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx");
  int *y = __builtin_preserve_access_index(&amp;arg-&gt;c);
  return *x + *y;
}
```
</details>


---

### Comment 2 - keinflue

Since Clang 9/10: https://godbolt.org/z/oKxK5EojP

Reduction 1 since Clang 10 (https://godbolt.org/z/4nab1vWcc):
```cpp
void f() {
  __builtin_preserve_access_index("ANY_STRING_HERE");
}
```

There is a secondary issue that reduces to (https://godbolt.org/z/nzoEvb3cs):
```cpp
struct weird {
  int c;
};
void test(struct weird *arg) {
  int *y = __builtin_preserve_access_index(&arg->c);
}
```
with error message
```
fatal error: error in backend: Cannot select: intrinsic %llvm.preserve.struct.access.index
```
also since Clang 10.

There is a similar issue for this second reduction at https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/92336.




---
